Many define LIHKG as a “Hong kong reddit”, but we do not censor for the Chinese Communist Party like Reddit. We do not delete pictures of 8964 Tiananmen Square. We uphold the value of freedom of speech.

Here are a few things you may want to know about LIHKG.

To people all around the world,

We, Hongkongers just experienced a terrorist attack planned and executed by our Hong Kong Police Force. At about 10pm today, our police force rushed into our railway system in Prince Edward station, got in to the carriage and indifferently beat up all the people in it regardless they are protesters or simply passengers. They ignored the weapon guidelines and fired tear gas indoor in the carriage which is in fact lethal. Also, they beat up innocent people causing them seriously wounded. Some passengers kneeled before them asking them to stop but the response they got were beaten ever harder. Meanwhile, the police haven’t arrested the passengers after they got beaten up, showing that the only purpose of their brutality was to sort their anger to violence but not dispersing the crowd.

We, Hongkongers are experiencing a humanitarian crisis and we hope that people all over the world can help us in anyways you can think of. Thank you and we will stay strong.

Hongkongers

replies.msg:
Once upon a time，是咁的, my girlfriend take me to a high class steakhouse to celebrate our anniversary.

Me English no good.

My girlfriend start ordering, the waiter is a ghost man. Despite I don’t know what 7 they saying, I know my head and pretend I understood.

After my girlfriend ordered, the waiter ask my girlfriend something, but he speak so lur and so quick that I can’t follow. My girlfriend replied “well done “.

So I 哦。。。。 and I know high class restaurant like to ask how the customer rate their services. Then the waiter ask me the same sentence, and I don’t want to let him know I copy my girlfriend and don’t know English.

I wisely replied “GOOD-JOB !”.

全民抗爭，十月一前每日堅持做以下嘅動作。係堅持，堅唔到都要堅持，請發誓你可以堅持成個九月：

1. 永遠抵制任何福建幫以及元朗鄉黑嘅商鋪、藍紅食店、cctvb廣告、黨鐵商埸。仲有記得逢星期五同日都罷買！好重要！記得搭黨鐵都要跳閘！好重要！

2. 低娛樂（閒時要做運動發洩、晚晚十點窗邊鳩叫、拒絕淘寶！）
3. 每日簽最少1個聯署（實搵到）
4. 全民打多條國際文宣戰線 (Twitter, Reddit)
5. 每星期最少參與1次行動，無行動去商場涼冷氣，理性咁教育自由行。
6. 每星期去連儂貼3張文宣
7. 出糧提款換美金
8. 唔好買入任何大陸公司股票
9. 轉埋你個MPF去外地基金
10. 不要說推，試著將呢整個訊息copy and paste嚟推post#kill
11. Tag或催你身邊三個人一齊參與

quote.msg: Can I ask why is LIHKG so famous?

replies.msg:
In my opinion, it's becoz LIHKG is most free forum in hk, no censorship at all unless it is against hk law, no moderators, foul language is also accepted.

Therefore, many creative people gather here and come up with many hk slangs and meme, even form a uniqle LIHKG culture. This's why it attracts people like me who want to follow and have a good laugh

The bad side is, there's also many hate speech to different group of people such as hk girls, gays and rich or poors, etc. But they are all gone since the movement begin, becoz we found that we're all bro and sis who stand together to fight with commies during the critical time

quote.msg: Can I ask why is LIHKG so famous?

In my opinion, it's becoz LIHKG is most free forum in hk, no censorship at all unless it is against hk law, no moderators, foul language is also accepted.

Therefore, many creative people gather here and come up with many hk slangs and meme, even form a uniqle LIHKG culture. This's why it attracts people like me who want to follow and have a good laugh

The bad side is, there's also many hate speech to different group of people such as hk girls, gays and rich or poors, etc. But they are all gone since the movement begin, becoz we found that we're all bro and sis who stand together to fight with commies during the critical time
